author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for web tools (WebFetch, WebSearch) — read CC tools/WebFetchTool/WebFetchTool.ts (~318 lines) and update the issue body. Not addressable in this cleanup session: deliverable is external-source TS reading, not Rust. Phase 2 implementations are tracked separately (#603 preapproved domain allowlist, #605 multiple search backends + Anthropic-native search, #608 secondary model distillation). The web spec is owner-level external research.
